title: The unveiling of the North Huajin Petrochemical Products Trading Center and the centralized (cloud) signing ceremony of the headquarters economic project were a complete success
contentHtml:
Northern Huajin Petrochemical Products Trading Center unveiled

And headquarters economic project centralized (cloud) signing ceremony

A complete success

Dear leaders, distinguished guests, ladies and gentlemen:

Good morning everyone! Spring returns to the earth and everything is renewed. I am very happy to gather here with you all on such a beautiful day to participate in the unveiling of the North Huajin Petrochemical Products Trading Center and the centralized (cloud) signing ceremony of the headquarters economic project. I am Wang Teng, the general manager of Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd. First of all, on behalf of all employees of our company, I would like to express my warm congratulations on the opening of the North Huajin Petrochemical Products Trading Center! Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd. was established in November 2008. The company currently has 200 employees, annual sales of more than 2.8 million tons, and sales of more than 25 billion yuan. Mainly engaged in polyethylene (PE), polypropylene (PP), polystyrene (PS), modified polystyrene (ABS), polyvinyl chloride (PVC), rubber, EVA and other businesses. It has a complete supporting logistics system to deliver products to customers with high quality and quantity. The sales scope covers Northeast, North and East China. Our company and Huajin Group have been partners for many years. Shuangtaizi District is a vibrant land for investment and business development, with vigorous vitality and vitality for development. We are full of fervent hopes and firm confidence in the future of the upcoming Northern Huajin Petrochemical Products Trading Center. Our company will continue to adhere to the concept of "integrity management, mutual benefit and win-win" and actively promote the development and implementation of various tasks. I believe that as long as we sincerely unite and cooperate closely, we will be able to give full play to our respective advantages and form synergy to promote the further development and growth of the Northern Huajin Petrochemical Trading Center and contribute to the economic development of Shuangtaizi District. Gather wisdom for development and work together to create a grand plan. Dear leaders and friends, let us go hand in hand to create wealth, achieve harmony and win-win results, and jointly build a Northeast petrochemical trading enterprise cluster and petrochemical product trading and distribution center. I wish our cooperation has a bright future and the road to cooperation will become wider and wider. Finally, I wish all leaders and friends good health, smooth work and all the best. Thank you all!
titleZh: 北方华锦石化产品交易中心揭牌暨总部经济项目集中（云）签约仪式圆满成功
contentHtmlZh:
北方华锦石化产品交易中心揭牌

暨总部经济项目集中（云）签约仪式

圆满成功

尊敬的各位领导、各位来宾、女士们、先生们：

大家上午好！春回大地，万象更新。非常高兴能在这样一个美好的日子与大家在这里相聚，共同参与北方华锦石化产品交易中心揭牌暨总部经济项目集中（云）签约仪式。我是秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司的总经理王腾，首先我谨代表本公司全体员工，对北方华锦石化产品交易中心揭牌表示热烈的祝贺！秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司成立于2008年11月，公司目前拥有员工200人，年销售量超过280万吨，销售额超过250亿元。主要经营聚乙烯（PE），聚丙烯(PP)，聚苯乙烯（PS），改性聚苯乙烯（ABS），聚氯乙烯（PVC），橡胶，EVA等业务。拥有完善的配套物流体系,保质保量将产品送达客户手中，销售范围覆盖东北、华北及华东各个地区。我公司与华锦集团是多年的合作伙伴，双台子区是一块充满生机的投资热土、兴业福地，有着蓬勃的朝气和发展的活力。我们对即将揭牌的北方华锦石化产品交易中心的未来充满了热切的希望和坚定的信心。我公司将持续秉承“诚信经营、互利双赢”的理念，积极推进各项工作发展落实。我相信，只要我们精诚团结、密切合作，就一定能够充分发挥各自优势，形成合力，为促进北方华锦石化交易中心的进一步发展壮大、为双台子区经济发展贡献力量。聚智谋发展，携手绘宏图。各位领导、各位朋友，让我们携手并进，共创财富，和谐共赢，共同打造东北石化贸易企业集聚区和石化产品交易集散地。祝愿我们的合作前程似锦，合作之路越走越宽。最后祝各位领导、各位朋友身体健康、工作顺利、万事如意。谢谢大家！
